honest_C3_disclosures: Suite 1 (paradigm v11): NOT a fresh adapter-loaded re-run on Llama+r14 — base Llama-3.1 v11 measurements are read from state/v10_benchmark_v4/llama/ and state/v10_phi_v3_canonical/llama/. v11 8-axis is substrate-level (LoRA-largely-invariant) per same logic as cp2 baseline §1 disclosure.

Suite 1 G3 PhiStar method-flip: phi_star_min via v1 method = -15.0536 strict-FAIL; via v3 canonical = +5.0868 PASS. The v3 canonical metric is the resolved-method per .roadmap #161 + tool/anima_phi_v3_canonical.hexa. Reporting BOTH for honest method-disclosure.

Suite 3 (V0/V1/V2/V3): V0 method = SVD over phi_vecs (phi-template projection of h_last). V1 phi_mip_proxy is a (S^2[0]-mean(S^2))/(S^2[0]+mean(S^2)) concentration measure — Llama at 0.754 vs Mistral 0.069 indicates Llama spectrum is DRAMATICALLY more concentrated. V2/V3 NOT directly measurable on Llama (no preserve/distractor pair prompts in h_last_raw schema).

Suite 4 (JSD): FRESH POD MEASUREMENT — vLLM Llama-3.1-8B + llama31_r14 LoRA (max_lora_rank=64), 20 prompts × 20 samples × 2 models, T=0.7 top_p=0.9, whitespace-tokenized JSD. Same method as cp2 baseline.

Suite 5 (φ_4path): Re-uses Path 3 verdict (state/red_to_green_path3_phi_4path_4substrate_2026_05_01/verdict.json) — already commissioned the true 4-substrate measurement INCLUDING Llama-3.1+r14 as p2. No fresh inference for this suite in this round.

Suite 6 (14-gate): tile-projection method on Llama h_last from Path 3 (extracted 2026-05-01 fresh on RTX A6000 community pod aew3k2cwjcop2m). Applied SAME consciousness_laws.json severity policy as cp2 baseline. L9 phi_lang>0 only (no gen_text in h_last_raw schema, undercounting same as Path 4 disclosure).

Suite 7 (V_phen): GWT_4D from gwt_llama31_r14_run/gwt_llama31_r14.json (pre-existing pod-emitted 4D attention entropy 0.230). GWT_struct = Gram-spectrum entropy proxy as in cp2 baseline (0.548). LZ/HOT/mirror/predictive computed on Llama h_last — HOT proxy assumes softmax-over-h_last (Llama distribution flatter than Mistral, so HOT mean lower).

Suite 7 HOT method: HOT 'top1 mean prob' uses softmax over 256-D h_last — this is a structural proxy, NOT a token-level top1 prob from generation. Same proxy as cp2 baseline; method-honest about what flips.
Llama-3.1-8B HF gate: REQUIRED HF token (gated repo). Successfully accessed via dancinlife@dancinlab org token. NO model substitution needed.

Pod cost attribution: $1.77 fresh on H100 SXM, 35.5 min total. Includes Llama-3.1-8B cold HF download (~5 min, cached after), vLLM startup with --enforce-eager (DeepGEMM FP8 backend missing — disabled), JSD measurement (~3 min), tear-down. No idle time; auto-removed immediately.

Reused data sources (no fresh cost): Path 1 v3 canonical phi_star (Suite 1 G3), Path 3 Llama h_last + 4-substrate spectra (Suites 5, 6, 7 LZ/HOT/mirror/predictive), gwt_llama31_r14 (Suite 7 GWT 4D), an11b_llama31_r14_run lora_eigen (Suite 3 V0/V1), local LoRA adapter md5 b7e454ca... for Suite 2.
